overall.description: Gameplay footage from a wizarding school potions classroom. The player character in a black robe explores the stone-walled gothic room with vaulted ceilings, examining chalkboards, potion stations, and storage cabinets while natural light filters through arched windows.

events.description: transition from potion brewing UI to third-person gameplay perspective

agents.ego_description: interacting with the potion brewing interface at the station

entered.detail: large black iron cauldron sitting on wooden table
open book with visible text and diagrams
small bottles and containers with ingredients
gothic arched window with diamond leaded panes letting in light

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a close-up potion brewing interface showing an iron cauldron, open spellbook, and ingredients on a wooden table. The UI displays brewing information for a Wiggenweld Potion before transitioning to gameplay.

scene_state.functional_zone: potions classroom with central worktable and chalkboard

events.description: character stops walking to examine the large chalkboard on the wall

agents.ego_description: walking from the potion table toward the large chalkboard and examining the diagrams

entered.detail: tall wooden-framed chalkboard covered with potion diagrams and writing
floor-to-ceiling wooden shelves filled with books and jars
gothic stone arch with windows at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the potion station across the stone floor toward a large chalkboard covered in diagrams. The room features high vaulted ceilings, wooden bookshelves lining the walls, and gothic arched windows letting in soft natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage area with ingredient cabinets and instruction boards

events.description: character stops to examine a wooden cabinet with glass doors containing specimens

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter examining storage cabinets and instruction chalkboards

entered.detail: dark wood cabinet with glass doors showing preserved specimens inside
tall cabinet with chalkboard surface displaying potion instructions and diagrams
large circular wooden worktable with papers and equipment scattered on top

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the wall past a wooden cabinet with glass doors containing specimens, stops briefly at an instruction chalkboard, then continues toward a large round worktable in the center of the stone-floored room.

scene_state.functional_zone: main classroom hall with vaulted ceiling and hanging plants

events.description: character stops and tilts camera upward to look at ceiling decorations
another student in robes comes into view walking in the background

agents.ego_description: walking through the main classroom area, looking up at the vaulted ceiling and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: another student in dark robes walking near the back archway

entered.detail: bundles of dried plants and cages suspended from the vaulted ceiling
lit wall-mounted lanterns with warm orange glow
human skeleton model standing against the wall near shelves

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the central worktable and looks up at dried plants hanging from the high vaulted ceiling. Wall lanterns provide warm lighting, and another student becomes visible walking in the background near a skeleton model by the shelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: back of classroom with tall storage cabinets

events.description: character stops to examine a tall wooden cabinet with glass doors

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining a tall storage cabinet at the back of the classroom

entered.detail: tall dark wood cabinet with glass doors containing potion equipment and bottles
large wicker basket on the stone floor next to the cabinet

segments.scene_description: The character walks to the back of the classroom and stops to examine a tall wooden storage cabinet with glass doors, revealing potion equipment inside. A wicker basket sits on the floor nearby, and light streams in from an arched window to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a detailed focus on a brewing station and expands to reveal the full scale of a gothic potions classroom. It begins with a close-up of an iron cauldron and spellbook on a wooden table before the perspective pulls back as the character walks across the stone floor toward a large chalkboard covered in diagrams. The scene then shifts along the perimeter, passing glass-doored specimen cabinets and an instruction board before moving toward a large round worktable in the center of the room. As the camera continues forward, it tilts upward to reveal dried plants hanging from the high vaulted ceiling and catches a glimpse of another student near a skeleton model under the warm glow of wall lanterns. Finally, the movement concludes at the back of the classroom, stopping to examine a tall storage cabinet filled with equipment as natural light streams in from a nearby arched window.
